title: EXCLUSIVE: Draft of new Danish coalition agreement pledges more active EU role
summary_full: A new ruling centrist coalition in Denmark will promise to halve the VAT rate on food, provide free dental care, and cut taxes for the rich, a recent draft of the coalition agreement seen by Euractiv writes. The draft, believed to be from yesterday, reflects the political priorities of Mette Frederiksen’s third government spanning the […]
